# Build 2026 Session Repository — OD858

This repository is part of **Microsoft Build 2026**. It contains session materials,
demo code, and resources for session **OD858: Personalize Your Windows PC with AI**.

## Context

- **Session Code:** OD858
- **Topic Area:** Windows
- **Technologies:** Windows 11, .NET 9, Python 3, Dynamic Lighting API, GitHub Copilot Skills
- **Maintained Repo:** [samanthamsong/windows-personalization-skill](https://github.com/samanthamsong/windows-personalization-skill)

## For Copilot

When working in this repo, refer to `GUIDANCE.md` for the session agent workflow
and `AGENTS.md` for security rules. The `src/` directory contains the demo code
snapshot — the actively maintained version is linked above.
